title: Calendar View Type
description: Defines the different view types available for calendar components, specifying how dates are displayed and organized.

props.name: year
props.description: Displays calendar in year view, showing multiple years for selection.

props.name: month
props.description: Displays calendar in month view, showing multiple months for selection.

props.name: day
props.description: Displays calendar in day view, showing individual days in a month grid.
